description_long: This is a large, rectangular stage structure with a prominent black exterior and a stepped roof design. The front features a wide, open proscenium framed by brown, wood-textured columns, leading into a recessed performance area. The stage floor is also brown, contrasting with the otherwise dark, matte surfaces. The sides and rear are solid and opaque, providing enclosure and acoustic isolation. The roof consists of several horizontal, tiered layers, giving the structure a modern, geometric appearance. The overall design suggests a contemporary outdoor or park performance stage, suitable for concerts or public events.
description: A modern, rectangular stage with a stepped black roof and brown wood-textured proscenium, designed for public performances.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open proscenium, brown columns, and recessed stage area.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the layered roof structure and the depth of the stage interior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, stepped black roof and back wall, with no visible openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, highlighting the stage's depth and layered roof.
